name: Combobox
description: Searchable select with filtering, custom values, and grouping.
gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <ComboboxInput /> and <ComboboxContent /> children — a bare <Combobox Items="..." /> with no children renders only an empty wrapper. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText (there is no ItemLabel parameter); items are typed as object, so the Combobox is not generic (no TItem).

api.name: Combobox
api.description: Searchable select with filtering, custom values, and grouping.

parameters.name: Open
parameters.description: Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Combobox lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern.

parameters.name: MaxDisplayTags
parameters.description: Cap on the number of selected-value chips rendered by ComboboxInput in Multiple mode; the rest collapse into a "+N more" indicator. Mirrors Select.MaxDisplayTags.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: When true, the input shows a clear (×) affordance that resets Value (or Values in Multiple mode) to its empty state. Mirrors Select.Clearable.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes merged onto the Combobox's wrapper element. Consistent with every other form component per the library's base API contract.

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Convenience placeholder shown by ComboboxInput when it doesn't set its own Placeholder. Lets consumers write <Combobox Placeholder="…"> instead of threading it through the input child.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the combobox text input on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM, this parameter uses FocusElement after the component has mounted.

parameters.name: Items
parameters.description: Optional data source. When set, ComboboxContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent.

parameters.name: ItemValue
parameters.description: Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString().

parameters.name: ItemText
parameters.description: Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null.

parameters.name: ItemGroup
parameters.description: Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers.

parameters.name: ItemDisabled
parameters.description: Optional per-item disabled predicate.

parameters.name: ItemDescription
parameters.description: Optional per-item secondary line (description) extractor. When set and ItemTemplate is null, the default item renderer shows the description in a smaller, muted line below the label — the standard pattern for command pickers (vscode-style "label + helper text").

parameters.name: ItemIcon
parameters.description: Optional per-item leading icon. Receives the raw item object and returns a RenderFragment (typically a single <Blazicon>). Rendered before the label when ItemTemplate is null. Skip via returning null per item to mix iconed and non-iconed rows.

parameters.name: ItemTemplate
parameters.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

parameters.name: Virtualize
parameters.description: When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list.

parameters.name: ItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36.

records.name: ComboboxContext
records.signature:
ComboboxContext(
        string? Value, HashSet<string>? Values, string SearchText, bool IsOpen, bool Multiple, bool IsSearchLoading, bool Creatable,
        EventCallback<string> OnSelect, EventCallback<bool> SetOpen, EventCallback<string> OnSearch,
        EventCallback<string> OnCreateItem,
        string WrapperId, string ContentId, string InputId, int FocusedIndex, string? FocusedItemId, string? FocusedItemValue,
        EventCallback<int> SetFocusedIndex,
        Action<string, string> RegisterItem, Action<string> UnregisterItem, int ItemCount,
        bool Invalid, bool Required,
        // Data-bound mode params (null when composition mode)
        IEnumerable<object>? Items,
        Func<object, string> ItemValue,
        Func<object, string>? ItemText,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemGroup,
        Func<object, bool>? ItemDisabled,
        Func<object, string?>? ItemDescription,
        Func<object, RenderFragment?>? ItemIcon,
        RenderFragment<object>? ItemTemplate,
        bool Virtualize,
        float ItemSize)

gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <ComboboxInput /> and <ComboboxContent /> children — a bare <Combobox Items="..." /> with no children renders only an empty wrapper. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText (there is no ItemLabel parameter); items are typed as object, so the Combobox is not generic (no TItem).

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Combobox @bind-Value="_selected" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Search frameworks..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="blazor">Blazor</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="react">React</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="vue">Vue.js</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxEmpty>No framework found.</ComboboxEmpty>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

examples.title: Country Selector
examples.code:
<Label>Country</Label>
<Combobox @bind-Value="_selected" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Search countries..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="Australia">Australia</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="Canada">Canada</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="France">France</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="United Kingdom">United Kingdom</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="United States">United States</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxEmpty>No country found.</ComboboxEmpty>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

examples.title: Multiple Selection
examples.code:
<Combobox Multiple="true" @bind-Values="_selectedFrameworks" @bind-Open="_isOpen">
    <ComboboxInput Placeholder="Select frameworks..." />
    <ComboboxContent>
        <ComboboxItem Value="react">React</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="vue">Vue</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="angular">Angular</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="svelte">Svelte</ComboboxItem>
        <ComboboxItem Value="blazor">Blazor</ComboboxItem>
    </ComboboxContent>
</Combobox>

@code {
    private HashSet<string> _selectedFrameworks = new();
    private bool _isOpen;
}

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Group header text. When null/empty the group renders no header (still nests its items).

parameters.name: LabelClass
parameters.description: Extra classes for the group label — theming hook for the header appearance.

parameters.name: Collapsible
parameters.description: When true the header toggles the group open/closed. Collapsed groups hide their items.

parameters.name: DefaultExpanded
parameters.description: Initial expanded state for a Collapsible group. Default expanded.

parameters.name: GroupSelect
parameters.description: In Multiple mode, render a tri-state checkbox on the header that selects / deselects every descendant item in one click.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the item renders muted/non-interactive, announces aria-disabled and cannot be selected by click — mirrors SelectItem.Disabled.

parameters.name: SearchValue
parameters.description: Optional text used to match against the search input. Falls back to Value.

slots.name: ItemTemplate
slots.description: Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.

mdSummary:
# Combobox

Searchable select with filtering, custom values, and grouping.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/combobox

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Combobox | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Open | `bool` | `` | Popover open state. Bind via @bind-Open when the Combobox lives inside a parent that re-renders heavily (e.g. an EditForm with active validation) — otherwise a parameter cascade can close the popover mid-click. In the bound (controlled) mode the parent owns state and the popover survives re-renders. When unbound, the component still functions but is vulnerable to the cascade-close race; binding is the recommended pattern. |
| Combobox | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Multiple | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Values | `HashSet<string>?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | ValuesChanged | `EventCallback<HashSet<string>>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | MaxDisplayTags | `int` | `3` | Cap on the number of selected-value chips rendered by ComboboxInput in Multiple mode; the rest collapse into a "+N more" indicator. Mirrors Select.MaxDisplayTags. |
| Combobox | Clearable | `bool` | `` | When true, the input shows a clear (×) affordance that resets Value (or Values in Multiple mode) to its empty state. Mirrors Select.Clearable. |
| Combobox | Creatable | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | OnCreate | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | OnSearchAsync | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Combobox | DebounceMs | `int` | `300` |  |
| Combobox | IsSearchLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| Combobox | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| Combobox | Class | `string?` | `` | Custom CSS classes merged onto the Combobox's wrapper element. Consistent with every other form component per the library's base API contract. |
| Combobox | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Convenience placeholder shown by ComboboxInput when it doesn't set its own Placeholder. Lets consumers write <Combobox Placeholder="…"> instead of threading it through the input child. |
| Combobox | AutoFocus | `bool` | `` | Focuses the combobox text input on first render. See Input.AutoFocus — the HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM, this parameter uses FocusElement after the component has mounted. |
| Combobox | Items | `IEnumerable<object>?` | `` | Optional data source. When set, ComboboxContent renders options from this list instead of ChildContent. |
| Combobox | ItemValue | `Func<object, string>` | `it => it?.ToString() ?? ""` | Extracts the string value for each item. Defaults to ToString(). |
| Combobox | ItemText | `Func<object, string>?` | `` | Extracts the display label for each item. Defaults to ItemValue when null. |
| Combobox | ItemGroup | `Func<object, string?>?` | `` | Optional group key extractor. When set, options are grouped under sticky headers. |
| Combobox | ItemDisabled | `Func<object, bool>?` | `` | Optional per-item disabled predicate. |
| Combobox | ItemDescription | `Func<object, string?>?` | `` | Optional per-item secondary line (description) extractor. When set and ItemTemplate is null, the default item renderer shows the description in a smaller, muted line below the label — the standard pattern for command pickers (vscode-style "label + helper text"). |
| Combobox | ItemIcon | `Func<object, RenderFragment?>?` | `` | Optional per-item leading icon. Receives the raw item object and returns a RenderFragment (typically a single <Blazicon>). Rendered before the label when ItemTemplate is null. Skip via returning null per item to mix iconed and non-iconed rows. |
| Combobox | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<object>?` | `` | Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object. |
| Combobox | Virtualize | `bool` | `` | When true and Items is set, uses Blazor's Virtualize component for the option list. |
| Combobox | ItemSize | `float` | `36f` | Estimated pixel height of each option row used by the Virtualize component. Default 36. |
| ComboboxContent | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext` | `default!` |  |
| ComboboxContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxContent | EmptyText | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxCreate | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext` | `default!` |  |
| ComboboxCreate | OnCreate | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| ComboboxCreate | ShowCreate | `bool` | `true` |  |
| ComboboxCreate | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxCreate | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxEmpty | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxEmpty | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxEmpty | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxEmpty | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxGroup | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext` | `default!` |  |
| ComboboxGroup | ParentGroup | `ComboboxGroupContext?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxGroup | Label | `string?` | `` | Group header text. When null/empty the group renders no header (still nests its items). |
| ComboboxGroup | LabelClass | `string?` | `` | Extra classes for the group label — theming hook for the header appearance. |
| ComboboxGroup | Collapsible | `bool` | `` | When true the header toggles the group open/closed. Collapsed groups hide their items. |
| ComboboxGroup | DefaultExpanded | `bool` | `true` | Initial expanded state for a Collapsible group. Default expanded. |
| ComboboxGroup | GroupSelect | `bool` | `` | In Multiple mode, render a tri-state checkbox on the header that selects / deselects every descendant item in one click. |
| ComboboxGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxInput | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext` | `default!` |  |
| ComboboxInput | Density | `Lumeo.Density?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxInput | Placeholder | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxItem | Context | `Combobox.ComboboxContext` | `default!` |  |
| ComboboxItem | Group | `ComboboxGroup.ComboboxGroupContext?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| ComboboxItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` | When true, the item renders muted/non-interactive, announces aria-disabled and cannot be selected by click — mirrors SelectItem.Disabled. |
| ComboboxItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ComboboxItem | SearchValue | `string?` | `` | Optional text used to match against the search input. Falls back to Value. |
| ComboboxItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Combobox) — RenderFragment slot
- `ItemTemplate` (Combobox) — Optional custom render fragment for an item's content. Receives the raw item object.
- `ChildContent` (ComboboxContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ComboboxEmpty) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ComboboxGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ComboboxItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `IsOpenChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `ValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<HashSet<string>>`)
- `OnCreate` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OnSearchAsync` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `ComboboxContent`, `ComboboxCreate`, `ComboboxEmpty`, `ComboboxGroup`, `ComboboxInput`, `ComboboxItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `Context` (`Combobox.ComboboxContext`)
- `ParentGroup` (`ComboboxGroupContext?`)
- `Density` (`Lumeo.Density?`)
- `Group` (`ComboboxGroup.ComboboxGroupContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — OnHeaderKeyDown handles Enter in ComboboxGroup.razor
- ` ` — OnHeaderKeyDown handles   in ComboboxGroup.razor
- `Spacebar` — OnHeaderKeyDown handles Spacebar in ComboboxGroup.razor

## Example
```razor
<Combobox />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Combobox/Combobox.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxContent.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxCreate.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxEmpty.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxGroup.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxInput.razor`
- `UI/Combobox/ComboboxItem.razor`
